title: viola × curnowii
intro: Viola × curnowii, also known as the hybrid viola, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross-breeding of Viola betonicifolia and Viola odorata. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Viola × curnowii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues.
